title: Aave DAO has approved the ARFC to deploy Aave V4 on @ethereum.
message_html: Aave DAO has approved the ARFC to deploy Aave V4 on @ethereum. ...
snippet: Aave (@aave): Aave DAO has approved the ARFC to deploy Aave V4 on @ethereum. Next up is an AIP vote, then launch.
